---
title: "swereg R package"
---

<span class="status-badge">Ongoing</span> <span class="listing-tags">Methods</span> <span class="listing-tags">Open-source tools</span>

## Background

We develop and maintain [swereg](https://papadopoulos-lab.github.io/swereg/), an open-source R package for working with Swedish healthcare registry data. The package provides a standardized set of tools for data cleaning, linkage, and analysis, lowering the barrier to reproducible registry-based research.

Placeholder: expand with motivation, history of the package, and what problems it solves.

## Team

- Fotis Papadopoulos, Principal Investigator
- Alexander Engberg, Statistical methods
- Placeholder: additional contributors

## Key outputs

### Code & data

- [swereg on GitHub](https://github.com/papadopoulos-lab/swereg)
- [Package documentation](https://papadopoulos-lab.github.io/swereg/)

### Publications

- Placeholder: cite any methodological paper or software note here.
